name: Zhen Yi
page_title: Zhen Yi 甄逸 [Han] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes: Zhen Yi hailed from Zhongshan Commandery (near modern-day Baoding, Hebei) and was father of Lady Zhen (who would become Empress Zhen as Cao Pi’s wife). He served the Han as a Commandery Governor and his family was wealthy. He died when Lady Zhen was only two years old. Despite his death, his family remained wealthy, and while the region was torn by war as the Han Dynasty crumbled apart his family played a crucial role in famine relief for the poor, an act with which Lady Zhen was personally involved.

He served the Han as a Commandery Governor and his family was wealthy. He died when Lady Zhen was only two years old. full_text:
Zhen Yi 甄逸
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhen Yi (甄逸)was born in Zhongshan Commandery (near modern-day Baoding, Hebei). Father of Empress Zhen, but died while she was young. Commandery Governor. Zhen Yi was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhen Yi lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.

BiographyHistoric (Unverified)
Zhen Yi hailed from Zhongshan Commandery (near modern-day Baoding, Hebei) and was father of Lady Zhen (who would become Empress Zhen as Cao Pi’s wife). He served the Han as a Commandery Governor and his family was wealthy. He died when Lady Zhen was only two years old. Despite his death, his family remained wealthy, and while the region was torn by war as the Han Dynasty crumbled apart his family played a crucial role in famine relief for the poor, an act with which Lady Zhen was personally involved.
